errors.network: Network connection error. Please check your internet connection.

404.title: Page Not Found
404.message: The page or study you are looking for does not exist.

429.title: Too Many Requests
429.message: You are doing that too fast. Please wait a moment.

500.title: Server Error
500.message: Our servers encountered an issue. Please try again later.

study_not_found.title: Study Not Found
study_not_found.message: We couldn't find a study with that name. Please check the URL or contact the researcher.

draft.title: Study Under Preparation
draft.message: This study is not available for participation yet. Please check back later.

paused.title: Maintenance in Progress
paused.message: Data collection is temporarily paused for maintenance. We will be back shortly.

closed.title: Data Collection Closed
closed.message: This study is now closed. Participation is no longer possible.

consent.label: I have read and agree to the terms above.
consent.error: Please accept the terms to continue.

welcome.reset_confirm: Are you sure you want to start a new session? This will clear your current progress.
welcome.default_instructions:
1. **Let's meet:** a few quick questions to better understand your background.
2. **First impressions:** discover the statements and give your immediate reaction (agree, neutral, or disagree).
3. **Your perspective:** refine your thoughts by placing each statement on the grid to reflect your exact viewpoint.
4. **Why:** a few words to explain your most significant choices.

consent.title: Participation Consent
consent.subtitle: Please read the following information carefully.
consent.default_text:
**Confidentiality and Anonymity:**
Your responses will be treated with strict confidentiality, anonymized, and in compliance with GDPR. Results will be aggregated to identify general trends (viewpoint factors) and will never allow for your individual identification.

**Data Usage:**
The data collected will be used exclusively for scientific research purposes.

**Voluntary Participation:**
Your participation is entirely voluntary. You are free to decline to participate or to withdraw from the study at any time without providing a justification.

presort.title: About You
presort.description: Please answer a few questions to help us situate your viewpoint.

header.title: What is your stance on this statement?
header.subtitle: Swipe **left** to Disagree, **right** to Agree, or **down** to be Neutral.
header.hint: Trust your **instinct**. This is spontaneous — you can change your mind right after.

complete.title: First Step Complete
complete.subtitle: We will now refine the nuances.

instructions.desktop_tip: Drag, press, or use keyboard ( ← ↓ → ) to sort

header.title: Sort the statements on the grid according to your unique and personal experience

deck.title: Available Statements
deck.all_placed: All statements in this pile are sorted

workbench.drag_or_tap: Drag to grid or tap slot

methodology.extremes: Tip: Start with what is most obvious to you (the extremes).
methodology.vertical: In the same column, the order from top to bottom doesn't matter.
methodology.constraint: You have to fit everything! It can be a puzzle, but that's how we prioritize choices.

post.title: To conclude
post.description: You're almost done! Your comments on the most significant statements are crucial for our analysis.

extreme.why: Why did you choose to place this statement here? How is it significant to you?
extreme.placeholder: E.g., A specific event, a strong belief, or a particular word in the statement...
extreme.min_chars: A few words are enough to help us understand the context.

optional.title: Additional Comments (optional)
optional.description: Feel free to add comments to any other statement if you wish to elaborate on your choices.

missing.label: Is there something important about your view that wasn't captured?
missing.description: If you feel an important aspect was left out, please describe it here.

general.label: General comments
general.description: Any feedback on the study or additional thoughts?

post.validation_error: Please briefly explain your key choices to continue.

success.title: Thank you for your participation!
success.message: Your contribution to the study has been saved.
